enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mannipaaya?

The song Mannipaaya expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

How does Mannipaaya fit into the plot of Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaaya?

In Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaaya, the song captures the protagonist's feelings of love and heartache, enhancing the emotional depth of the story.

Who is the singer and music director of Mannipaaya?

The song is sung by Shreya Goshal and composed by AR Rahman, known for their exceptional musical talents.

When was Mannipaaya released?

Mannipaaya was released on January 12, 2010, as part of the movie Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaaya.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Mannipaaya is a soulful melody that encapsulates the feelings of love and longing experienced by the characters in the movie. The song's soothing composition by AR Rahman, paired with Shreya Goshal's heartfelt vocals, creates an emotional atmosphere that resonates with listeners. It beautifully conveys the struggles and joys of romance, making it a perfect fit for moments of reflection and intimacy. The lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, allowing the audience to connect deeply with the sentiments expressed.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mannipaaya from Vinnaithaandi Varuvaaaya is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Shreya Goshal's enchanting vocals and AR Rahman's magical composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. The collaboration between these musical talents creates an unforgettable listening experience that lingers in the heart.
stanzaMeanings: I came to you like a fish from the sea, I have returned to my roots, my heart is beating for you.
One day I smiled, another day I felt sad, without being able to hold you, I am lost, oh my love.. oh my love..
One day I smiled, another day I felt sad, without being able to hold you, I am lost, oh my love.. oh my love.. oh my love.. oh my love..
I danced like a raindrop in the thread of life, because of you I became an artist. You are the light in my life, you are always with me. What will I do with my heart, what will I do with my heart?

In the flowing water, I am the one who feels the depth, even if I get a blessing, I have made a mistake, I am lost, my love. In the breeze, I am the letter that you have sent to me. With love, I am tied to you.. for our sake.
One day I smiled, another day I felt sad, without being able to hold you, I am lost, oh my love.. oh my love.. oh my love.. oh my love.. oh my love..
Why have you come into my life, my dear? Are you going away like a drop of water? Everyone will fall asleep at midnight, but I will not forget you even for a moment.
One day I smiled, another day I felt sad, without being able to hold you, I am lost, oh my love.. oh my love.. oh my love.. oh my love..
I danced like a raindrop in the thread of life, because of you I became an artist. You are the light in my life, you are always with me. What will I do with my heart, what will I do with my heart?
More and more, I melt for you, what will I do with my heart? More and more, I melt for you, what will I do with my heart? More and more, I melt for you, what will I do with my heart?
